summary: Completed testing of NurseReady bug fixes - All 4 requested fixes verified working. Backend 100% pass (15/15 tests), Frontend 100% functional for tested features.
passed_tests: Global search (/api/search) finds drugs when searching 'paracetamol' - returns drug suggestions with 'Tap to search'
Drug search (/api/drugs/search?query=paracetamol) shows 'Paracetamol (ACETAMINOPHEN)' as first result (single-ingredient prioritized)
Drug search returns deduplicated results (5 unique results, no duplicates)
Drug search shows 'Searched as: acetaminophen' badge for Australian drug names
Homepage does NOT show 'Recently Viewed' section - removed as requested
Communication page (/communication) loads with 6 handover guides
ISBAR Framework has all 5 sections (I,S,B,A,R) with examples
SBAR Framework available in communication guides
Global search finds 'heart' in body systems (Cardiovascular System)
Global search finds 'isbar' in communication guides
Drug search auto-fills from URL query param (/drugs?q=paracetamol)
Clicking drug suggestion in global search navigates to /drugs?q={drugName}
Drug search works with Australian names (salbutamol -> albuterol)
Categories endpoint returns 9 categories for homepage
Nursing tip section displays on homepage
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing curated data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: (1) Global search now finds drugs like paracetamol, (2) Drug search deduplicates and prioritizes single-ingredient drugs, (3) Homepage no longer shows Recently Viewed, (4) Communication page has ISBAR with examples. OpenFDA API is live (not mocked). Splash disclaimer must be accepted before testing UI.

features_verified.global_search_drugs: PASS - /api/search returns drugs array with suggestions from AU_TO_US_DRUG_NAMES mapping
features_verified.drug_search_deduplication: PASS - Single-ingredient drugs prioritized, no duplicates
features_verified.homepage_recently_viewed_removed: PASS - No 'Recently Viewed' section on homepage
features_verified.communication_isbar: PASS - 6 guides including ISBAR with 5 sections and examples
